description: First 10 divergences from septuagint-notes-messy.txt (research IDs 1-10), 11 diffs total

diffs.lxx_greek: adds καὶ ἐγένετο οὕτως at end of verse
diffs.description: Harmonizes with the formula used in 1:9, 1:11, 1:15, 1:24 where 'and it was so' follows God's creative command

diffs.lxx_greek: καὶ συνήχθη τὸ ὕδωρ τὸ ὑποκάτω τοῦ οὐρανοῦ εἰς τὰς συναγωγὰς αὐτῶν καὶ ὤφθη ἡ ξηρά
diffs.lxx_english: and the water under the heaven was gathered into their gatherings and the dry land appeared
diffs.source: Steinmann; LXX expands execution of God's command
diffs.description: LXX adds narrative fulfillment after 'and it was so' describing the actual gathering of waters

diffs.lxx_english: to give light on the earth
diffs.description: Harmonizes v.14 with v.15 which says 'to give light on the earth'
God finished his work on the sixth day (LXX) vs seventh day (MT). Only first occurrence in verse — v2:2b 'rested on the seventh' stays.

diffs.source: Steinmann; 1 of 35 divine name deviations in LXX Genesis
diffs.description: LXX has 'God' where MT has 'YHWH God'. Remove 'YHWH', retain 'God'.
LXX has 'God' where MT has 'YHWH God'. Remove 'YHWH', retain 'God'.
LXX has 'God' where MT has 'YHWH God'. Remove 'YHWH', retain 'God'.

diffs.lxx_english: the two of them into one flesh
diffs.source: Steinmann; SP agrees; Matt 19:5, Mark 10:8, 1 Cor 6:16, Eph 5:31 quote with 'the two'
diffs.description: LXX adds 'the two' to clarify that man and wife become one flesh

diffs.lxx_english: he shall watch/guard against your head
diffs.description: First verb: MT 'bruise/strike' (yeshufekha) vs LXX 'watch/guard' (yishmerekha). Both have masculine pronoun.
diffs.note: Vulgate has 'ipsa' (she) in some editions creating Marian reading. LXX αὐτός is masculine.

diffs.lxx_english: and you shall watch/guard against his heel
diffs.description: Second verb: MT 'bruise/strike' (teshufenu) vs LXX 'watch/guard' (tishmerenu). Completes the pair with diff 9.

diffs.lxx_english: Let us go into the field
diffs.source: Steinmann; SP, Peshitta, Vulgate (some MSS) agree
diffs.description: MT has speech marker but no speech content. LXX preserves Cain's actual words to Abel.
